text: - 3.3 DIGITAL DOCUMENTS ('PAPERLESS' JOBSITE): To efficiently manage the potential for rapidly changing construction documents, prevent rework caused by out of date information, and further goals to operate more sustainably, Contractor will house all current Subcontract Documents in Procore Construction Project Management Software. The documents can be accessed online at the Contractor's jobsite office, Subcontractor PC's, or mobile devices. Subcontractors are strongly encouraged to provide mobile devices for its on-site management team (foreman, project managers) to access to these documents which will be updated throughout the project.  Access to the documents is not dependent on a constant network connection, allowing use of Wi-Fi only mobile devices. Procore allows for simple navigation to sections, details, and other cross- referenced project information such as RFI's, Directives, and Approved Submittals.
